social.name: Nayib Bukele
social.text:
Nigeria’s economy is 6–8 times larger than El Salvador’s.

Even its GDP is eight times bigger than theirs. 

Nigeria is richer than El Salvador, and yet it cannot even boast of having a world-class hospital like this.


Nayib Bukele (@nayibbukele)

The best hospital in Central Am

social.name: Donald Trump
social.text: Horrible Congressman Thomas Massie put out an old Endorsement, from many years ago, of him by me long before I found out that he was the Worst Congressman in the History of our Country. I endorsed Ed Gallrein, a true American Patriot, which Massie knows full well, so the statemen
